matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a VDR vitamin D receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription and Bone mineral and calcium homeostasis context, Immune and infection association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed rs2228570 (VDR FokI) dosage suggests this sample carries the VDR prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. This specific marker is curated as VDR translation-start marker. rs2228570 (VDR FokI) is curated as a VDR marker for Bone mineral and calcium homeostasis context, Immune and infection association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs2228570 (VDR FokI) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the VDR prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a VDR vitamin D receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription and Bone mineral and calcium homeostasis context, Immune and infection association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. An observed VDR variant places this sample in the curated VDR research context. The local VDR bundle is vitamin D receptor signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. VDR variants can alter or tag vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
cases.prediction: When a VDR variant is paired with high methylation in the whitelist mean beta, the sample best fits a combined regulatory-context thesis. This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus. The variant side of the thesis is: The variant observed in this sample suggests a VDR vitamin D receptor signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription and Bone mineral and calcium homeostasis context, Immune and infection association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. VDR methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a vitamin D hormone signaling, calcium/phosphate homeostasis, immune modulation, bone biology, and nuclear receptor transcription gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data. The local VDR bundle is vitamin D receptor signaling oriented.
